text.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration Decision Tree Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Multi-Agent Orchestration Decision Tree output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: list of distinct subtasks the system handles

forbidden.pattern: topology_pick == multi-agent without justification per r1
judge-actor used without measured quality lift

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: subtasks populated with a typed value
topology_pick populated with a typed value
handoff_protocol populated with a typed value
judge_actor_used populated with a typed value
rollback_trigger populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
